title: the_prince_of_two_threads
style: epic cinematic, ancient Persia, hyperreal photorealistic faces, IMAX-quality, lush warm color palette of saffron crimson gold deep ultramarine, volumetric god rays through stone columns, sandstorms in golden hour, intricate Achaemenid bas-reliefs, lapis lazuli and gold leaf, flowing fabric in cosmic wind, every frame painterly composition
setting: ancient Persia in the time of dying — a vast Persepolis-inspired royal palace of carved limestone columns and golden lion bas-reliefs rising above a cracked sun-blasted earth, distant withered gardens of pomegranate and date palm, the great river running black, vultures circling against an amber sky, and beyond the palace walls a desert that should have been an empire

characters.DARIUS: Crown prince of ancient Persia, mid-twenties, divided being. LIGHT SIDE: olive-skinned with handsome strong jaw, dark stubble, piercing blue eyes, long flowing dark-brown hair, athletic muscular frame, ancient Persian royal garments — flowing crimson silk robe with intricate gold thread embroidery and gold trim leather chest armor, ornate jeweled belt, gold cuffs on wrists, single gold earring. DARK SIDE: half his face and right arm transformed into smooth obsidian-black armored skin etched with intricate machined geometric patterns and faint glowing red veins, jagged spike-like ridges along the shoulder, a single intense glowing golden eye where the right eye should be, the eye irises pulsing with otherworldly light, the transformation flowing like dark molten metal across that side of his body
characters.AHURA_MAZDA: Luminous divine presence, manifest as a tall radiant humanlike figure made of living golden light and white flame, flowing white robes that move as if in cosmic wind, no distinct facial features but two eyes of brilliant starlight, a faint outline of an ancient bearded sage visible through the radiance, columns of golden light flowing around him, divine peace incarnate
characters.AHRIMAN: Manifest darkness — a writhing serpentine cloud of pitch-black tendrils with multiple scattered glowing red eyes opening and closing across the surface, never a fixed form, sometimes condensing into a vague humanoid silhouette, sometimes a vast spreading shadow consuming light, malevolent intelligence in every motion
characters.CHILD: A young child of perhaps eight years, soft warm skin, gentle dark eyes, simple white linen robes, neatly braided dark hair, peaceful curious expression, the child of a flourishing future age
characters.WOMAN: An elderly Persian woman in her sixties, gaunt cheeks from famine, weathered olive skin, threadbare grey shawl, sunken hopeful eyes, a survivor of the dying time

negative_prompt: music, background music, soundtrack, score, instruments, drums, drum beat, oud, lute, sitar, flute, percussion, melody, melodic, instrumental, ambient music, song, singing, chanting, deformed, mutilated, extra limbs, extra fingers, malformed face, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, subtitles, cartoon, anime

scenes.description: Extreme close-up on cracked dry desert sand. A single perfect drop of water falls slowly from above. The drop hits the sand. From the impact point, vibrant green grass spirals outward in a perfect glowing circle, blades unfurling in real time as if time accelerated locally
scenes.camera: macro extreme close-up on the impact, slow motion
scenes.mood: miraculous, sacred, the impossible made visible

scenes.description: A small child's hand reaches into frame and gently picks one blade of the new grass. The camera pulls back slowly to reveal the CHILD standing barefoot at the foot of an enormous translucent crystal tree of life, the tree's branches filled with internal galaxies and slowly pulsing golden light, distant stars visible through the crystalline trunk
scenes.camera: wide reveal pulling back, slow gentle lift

scenes.description: Medium close-up on the child's face, large dark eyes wide with wonder. The crystal tree glows softly behind. The child holds the blade of grass carefully in both hands, studying it. Then looks up at the tree with a small smile of recognition. After a contemplative breath, the child speaks reverently to no one. After speaking, the child looks up at the tree's distant canopy and watches a luminous fruit slowly form on a high branch
scenes.camera: medium close-up, child eye level

dialogue.line: Father told me the world was once dying.

scenes.description: HARD CUT — wide cinematic shot of a vast cracked dead desert under a blood-amber sky, a withered Persepolis-inspired palace of carved stone columns rising in the distance silhouetted against the dying sun, vultures wheeling, dust devils sweeping across endless drought-parched earth
scenes.camera: wide cinematic establishing shot, slow drone push-in
scenes.mood: world-ending dread, the time of dying

scenes.description: Inside the great palace. PRINCE DARIUS stands alone before a massive arched window, his back to camera, looking out at the dying land. His flowing crimson silk robe with gold thread catches the amber light. His shoulders are tense. The hall behind him is empty, echoing, lit by torches
scenes.camera: wide shot of his back at the window, slow push-in

scenes.description: Close-up on Darius as he turns slowly from the window. Handsome strong jaw, dark stubble, piercing blue eyes burdened with the weight of his people, dark-brown flowing hair stirred by the dry palace breeze. He pauses, gathering himself. After speaking with quiet authority, he closes his eyes briefly and exhales, the question hanging in the empty air
scenes.camera: medium close-up on Darius

dialogue.line: How many died this morning?

scenes.description: Wide shot of an OLDER PALACE ATTENDANT kneeling on the polished stone floor before Darius, wearing simple servant robes, his head bowed, holding an unfurled scroll in trembling hands. Torchlight flickers across the carved bas-relief walls behind him. He hesitates, then unfurls the scroll further. After speaking with grief in his voice, he keeps his head bowed and lets the scroll roll closed in his shaking hands
scenes.camera: wide shot, slight high angle on the kneeling attendant

dialogue.line: Three hundred more in the eastern provinces, my lord. The wells run black.

scenes.description: Close on Darius's face, his blue eyes hardening with resolve. He turns his head slightly toward an open doorway through which the distant glow of a temple flame is visible. He breathes in once, deeply. After speaking with quiet determination, he steps forward decisively, his crimson robe billowing behind him as he walks toward the doorway
scenes.camera: medium close-up, slight low angle on Darius

dialogue.line: Then I will go to the fire tonight. Alone.

scenes.description: Night. Wide cinematic shot of Darius walking alone across a moonlit ruined courtyard toward an ancient open-air fire temple, a pillar of orange flame burning within a stone altar at its center. He carries a torch. The stars above are wrong — twisted constellations, a red hue at the horizon. Wind moves his crimson robe
scenes.camera: wide shot, tracking from behind

scenes.description: Medium shot. Darius approaches the sacred fire altar in the temple ruin. He plants his torch in the ground and kneels before the flame, head bowed in ancient prayer. The fire flickers wildly as if disturbed
scenes.camera: medium shot, tilt down to follow him kneeling

scenes.description: Close on the cracked stone floor before the altar. The cracks suddenly widen into glowing red fissures. From within them a single black tendril emerges, snaking upward, multiple red eyes opening along its length
scenes.camera: tight close-up on the cracks and emerging tendril

scenes.description: Medium shot. The tendril strikes Darius's right arm with terrible speed. He gasps sharply, eyes flying open in shock, and grips his arm. Black corruption immediately begins spreading up his sleeve, his veins darkening visibly through the skin. After his sharp cry of confusion, he stumbles backward and stares at his arm in horror
scenes.camera: medium shot, dynamic angle

dialogue.line: What is this?

scenes.description: Close-up on Darius's right arm. The skin is transforming — flowing like liquid metal into smooth obsidian-black armored skin etched with intricate machined geometric patterns and faint glowing red veins, jagged ridges erupting along the shoulder. He grips the arm with his still-human left hand, fighting it
scenes.camera: tight close-up on the transforming arm

scenes.description: Close on Darius's face. Half is still his handsome blue-eyed self, the other half transforming — obsidian-black metallic skin spreading from his jaw, a single glowing GOLDEN EYE opening where his right eye was, the iris pulsing with otherworldly cosmic light. He stares at his own reflection in a fragment of the broken altar mirror
scenes.camera: intense close-up on his divided face, slow rack focus

scenes.description: Medium shot. Darius staggers backward from the altar, his transformed right hand raised. Suddenly the world around him SLOWS — falling embers from the fire freeze in mid-air, dust hangs suspended, his torch's flame becomes a still sculpture. He looks at his glowing golden eye reflected in the suspended embers, awestruck
scenes.camera: medium shot, time-frozen environment around him

scenes.description: Close on Darius's hand passing slowly THROUGH the suspended embers, the embers parting like water around his fingers and rejoining behind. His golden eye reflects this miracle. He pauses, comprehending. After he speaks barely above a whisper of awe, time slowly resumes — embers fall, flame moves, dust swirls, and he closes his hand into a contemplative fist
scenes.camera: tight close-up on his hand and the suspended embers

dialogue.line: Time itself bends.

scenes.description: Wide shot of the temple ruin. A column of pure golden light descends silently from the sky, striking the stone floor between Darius and the altar. Within the column, a luminous figure begins to take shape — AHURA MAZDA, a tall divine presence of living golden light and white flame, flowing robes of cosmic wind, a faint outline of an ancient bearded sage visible through the radiance
scenes.camera: wide shot, low angle on the descending light column

scenes.description: Medium two-shot. Ahura Mazda stands serene before Darius, his eyes of brilliant starlight regarding the prince's divided face. Darius is on one knee, awestruck. Ahura Mazda raises a hand of golden light slowly, palm outward in greeting. He pauses, surveying the prince. After speaking with ancient gravity, he extends both hands of golden light, the radiance softening across the courtyard stones
scenes.camera: medium two-shot, eye level

dialogue.line: Child of Cyrus. I have watched since the dark first fell.

scenes.description: Close on Darius, his blue eye and golden eye both wide with wonder and fear, kneeling on the cracked temple floor. He looks down at his transformed right arm, then up at the divine figure. After speaking with his voice cracking with anguish, he gestures helplessly at his transformed arm and bows his head
scenes.camera: intense close-up on Darius

dialogue.line: What have I become?

scenes.description: Medium shot. Ahura Mazda kneels gracefully to Darius's eye level, his radiant figure haloed by the column of golden light. The flame on the altar burns steady and bright. Before speaking, he raises a hand of light and gestures at Darius's transformed shoulder. After speaking with gentle authority, he places a hand of light on Darius's transformed shoulder — the obsidian skin softens to a faint amber glow under the touch, then the darkness slowly reclaims it as Darius bows his head
scenes.camera: medium two-shot, eye level intimacy

dialogue.line: Two threads woven on one loom. The Lie has touched you, but you have not yet broken.

scenes.description: Two-shot. Darius slowly stands. The transformation pulses on his right side, the golden eye glowing in rhythm with the altar flame. Ahura Mazda rises with him, towering serene. The divine figure pauses, looking out across the dark land beyond the temple. After speaking with solemn purpose, he extends an outstretched hand that shimmers, and a path of golden light blooms from the temple floor outward into the night, leading away into the dark land toward unseen mountains
scenes.camera: wide two-shot, both standing, low angle

dialogue.line: Walk with me, prince. We will seal him forever in the tree that was made before the abyss.

scenes.description: Wide cinematic shot of Darius striding across the cracked desert at dawn, his transformed arm at his side, his crimson robe flowing in the dry wind, the path of golden light dimly visible ahead leading him onward, the rising sun burning amber on the horizon
scenes.camera: wide cinematic shot, side-tracking

scenes.description: Medium shot. Darius approaches an old withered well where an ELDERLY WOMAN sits collapsed against the stone, gaunt and thirsty, her threadbare grey shawl about her shoulders, weak hopeful eyes looking up at him. He kneels before her
scenes.camera: medium two-shot, eye level

scenes.description: Close-up on the woman's face as she draws a shaky breath, her cracked lips parting with effort. She looks up at the prince with hope she has not allowed herself in months. After she speaks her plea slowly with grief and hope intermingled, she trembles and Darius reaches toward her with his still-human left hand, his fingertips beginning to glow softly
scenes.camera: intense close-up on the woman

dialogue.line: My lord. My grandchildren. The water turned black.

scenes.description: Close on Darius's left hand touching the woman's forehead. His hand begins to glow with soft golden light. Where the light touches her skin, the gauntness fades, color returns to her cheeks. He pauses, channeling the light. After he speaks with quiet kindness, his hand leaves a trace of golden warmth on her brow and he gently helps her sit upright
scenes.camera: tight close-up on the healing touch

dialogue.line: Drink at the next well, mother. It will be clean.

scenes.description: Wide shot. Darius stands and walks on. The woman watches him go, slowly rising stronger, hands clasped in awe. Other ragged figures emerge from a nearby ruin and begin to follow him at a respectful distance — five, then ten, then twenty wanderers in tattered robes
scenes.camera: wide tracking shot following Darius with growing crowd

scenes.description: Wide shot. The cracked earth before Darius's path suddenly TEARS OPEN — a churning mass of black tendrils with scattered glowing red eyes erupts from the rift, condensing into a towering humanoid shadow. AHRIMAN's first manifestation. The crowd behind Darius stops, terrified
scenes.camera: wide low-angle shot, ahriman's emergence

scenes.description: Medium shot of Darius alone facing the towering shadow. He raises his transformed right hand, golden eye blazing. The world SLOWS — Ahriman's tendrils freeze mid-strike. Darius walks calmly between them, his hand glowing both gold and red. After he speaks with steel in his voice, time resumes and he plunges his hand into the shadow's center
scenes.camera: medium shot, time-frozen environment

dialogue.line: Not here. Not them.

scenes.description: Wide shot. The shadow shrieks silently and disperses into smoke as Darius's hand pulses with light and dark intertwined. He stands panting in the smoking remnant. The crowd behind cheers softly. But the camera pushes in on Darius — his golden eye now glows MORE intensely than before, the dark transformation creeping further across his cheek
scenes.camera: wide shot then push-in to his face

scenes.description: Night. Close-up on Darius alone by a campfire, looking at his transformed right hand. The golden eye pulses. Black veins now creep down his neck onto his chest. He grips his hand as if trying to suppress the spread, his blue eye anguished. He hesitates, looking around to make sure no one hears. After he speaks with his voice hoarse and shaken, he closes his eyes tightly and bows his head over his transformed hand
scenes.camera: tight close-up by firelight

dialogue.line: He whispers to me. He says I am already his.

scenes.description: Wide shot. The column of golden light returns silently — Ahura Mazda materializes across the campfire from Darius. His radiance cleanses some of the darkness from the air. The other followers sleep nearby, oblivious. Ahura Mazda kneels gracefully to meet Darius's eye level. He pauses, regarding the prince with infinite patience. After speaking with gentle but firm conviction, he extends a hand of light over the campfire, which flares briefly white
scenes.camera: wide shot, both at firelight, slow push-in

dialogue.line: The Lie grows when you doubt. Your task is not to destroy yourself.

scenes.description: Two-shot of Darius and Ahura Mazda by the fire. Darius leans forward urgently, his face cast half in firelight half in golden divine glow. Ahura Mazda raises a hand and traces a slow shape in the air — light follows his fingertip, drawing a stylized tree with crystal branches that hangs glowing between them. He pauses, letting Darius study it. After speaking with the weight of ancient prophecy, the floating light-tree slowly fades and his eyes meet Darius's, unwavering
scenes.camera: intimate two-shot, low angle

dialogue.line: He fears the tree. The crystal is older than the abyss. Lead him there. Make him follow you in.

scenes.description: Wide cinematic establishing shot of Darius and his now-large following — fifty ragged Persians of all ages — marching across a vast desert ridge toward distant snow-capped mountains. Sun blazing overhead. Darius leads with his crimson robe and dark transformed arm, his golden eye scanning the horizon
scenes.camera: wide cinematic tracking shot, slow drone follow

scenes.description: Wide cinematic reveal. The followers reach a hidden valley. Within the valley, an enormous translucent CRYSTAL TREE of life rises from the cracked earth — ancient, dormant, branches empty of fruit, internal pulsing light barely visible, distant stars faintly seen through its trunk. Darius and his followers stop, awestruck
scenes.camera: wide reveal, slow camera lift over the valley edge

scenes.description: Medium shot. Darius walks alone into the valley toward the crystal tree, leaving his followers behind on the ridge. His crimson robe drags through the dust. His transformed right side darkens further with each step, the golden eye blazing brighter. He pauses at the foot of the tree, raising his transformed hand. After he speaks softly with grim resolve, almost to himself, the wind dies completely and a deep silence falls across the valley
scenes.camera: medium tracking shot from behind

dialogue.line: Then come, devourer. I will give you what you have always wanted.

scenes.description: Wide shot. The desert sand at the base of the tree splits open. AHRIMAN rises in his fullest manifestation — a vast towering writhing column of black tendrils thirty feet tall, multiple red eyes scattered throughout, condensing into a vague horned humanoid silhouette. The temperature drops. Darius stands small before him
scenes.camera: wide low-angle shot, ahriman towering

scenes.description: Medium shot. Ahriman LUNGES at Darius, multiple tendrils striking from different angles. Darius raises his transformed hand — the world fragments into multiple frozen moments around him, his after-images visible at three positions simultaneously, then he reappears beside Ahriman's writhing core, blade drawn
scenes.camera: dynamic medium shot, time-fragmented composition

scenes.description: Close-up on Ahriman's writhing core, multiple red eyes turning toward Darius. A single tendril shoots out and seizes Darius's transformed right arm, dark mass merging with dark mass. Ahriman's voice is multiple voices speaking in unison, deep and vast and patient. After speaking with cold certainty, the grip tightens and more tendrils begin coiling around Darius's torso
scenes.camera: tight close-up on the seized arm

dialogue.line: You are already mine, prince. Stop struggling.

scenes.description: Close on Darius's face. His blue eye burns with defiance, his golden eye blazing. Black corruption surges across his cheek but he stands his ground. He grips Ahriman's tendril with his transformed hand, pulling the darkness toward himself. After he speaks with desperate triumph, he LUNGES forward into Ahriman's mass, embracing the darkness, pulling them both toward the crystal tree's trunk
scenes.camera: intense close-up on Darius

dialogue.line: Then come into the tree with me!

scenes.description: Wide cinematic shot. Darius and Ahriman strike the crystal tree's trunk together. The crystal flashes blinding white. Both figures are pulled INTO the trunk itself, sealed within as silhouettes — Darius's blue eye and Ahriman's red eyes both visible inside the translucent crystal, frozen in eternal struggle. The followers on the ridge fall to their knees
scenes.camera: wide shot, slow push-in to the sealed crystal

scenes.description: Close-up on the crystal trunk. Inside, the silhouettes struggle — Ahriman trying to push outward, Darius holding him in. With each push of Ahriman's darkness, the crystal absorbs the energy and pulses brighter. The branches above begin to glow from within, light flowing outward from trunk to twig
scenes.camera: tight close-up on the glowing crystal interior

scenes.description: Wide shot of the entire crystal tree. It pulses with growing internal light. From the highest branches, golden luminous spheres begin to materialize — the FIRST FRUIT of the tree of life, glowing softly with internal stars, growing in real time before the awestruck followers' eyes
scenes.camera: wide cinematic shot, slow camera lift

scenes.description: Medium shot. Ahura Mazda appears at the foot of the tree in his column of golden light. He reaches up slowly and gently picks one luminous fruit from the lowest branch. His radiance and the fruit's light merge. He cradles the fruit in both hands of light, regarding it with reverence. After speaking with quiet wonder, he turns and walks slowly toward the elderly woman from before, who has joined the followers and stands trembling at the edge of the gathering
scenes.camera: medium shot, ahura mazda picking the fruit

dialogue.line: His own struggle has powered the bloom. The first fruit. For the first who suffered.

scenes.description: Close-up two-shot. The elderly woman receives the glowing fruit in trembling hands. She bites into it carefully. Instantly her hair darkens from grey to black, her cheeks fill out, her gauntness vanishes, decades of life return to her face in seconds. Tears of joy stream down her face
scenes.camera: intimate close-up on the woman eating

scenes.description: Close-up on a single drop of golden fruit juice falling from the woman's chin. The drop hits the cracked desert sand. From the impact point, vibrant green grass spirals outward in a perfect glowing circle. CALLBACK to the very first scene of the film
scenes.camera: macro close-up on the juice drop hitting sand

scenes.description: Time-lapse wide shot. From the foot of the crystal tree, lush green spreads outward across the desert in waves, a great oasis blooming where dust was, palm trees rising, water springs erupting, the dying river running clear and bright. The scale is vast — entire valleys flourishing in seconds
scenes.camera: wide aerial time-lapse, sweeping camera move

scenes.description: Wide cinematic montage shot. Years pass in motion-blur — Persian people building extraordinary new cities of luminous crystal and gold, towers spiraling impossibly high, flying machines of polished bronze rising between minarets, libraries of glowing books, advanced civilization unfolding from the new abundance
scenes.camera: wide shot, time-lapse civilization

scenes.description: Wide cinematic shot. The Persian people now in advanced robes of woven light, gathered at the foot of the crystal tree. Above them, immense crystalline starships are rising from the gardens, gleaming and silent, carrying glowing fruits in protected chambers. The people wave, joyful
scenes.camera: wide cinematic shot, ships ascending

scenes.description: Wide cosmic establishing shot. The starships traverse the void between worlds. They arrive at distant alien planets — barren red moons, ice worlds, ringed gas giants with floating rocks. From each ship, a fruit is gently placed in the alien soil. From each fruit, life spreads outward — green, blue, every color, healing the universe one world at a time
scenes.camera: wide cosmic shot, montage of worlds blooming

scenes.description: Wide shot returning to the original crystal tree, now in its final glory — branches heavy with luminous fruit, internal galaxies brighter than ever, the tree taller than ever, surrounded by lush gardens and crystal spires. Inside the trunk, faintly visible — Darius's silhouette stands peaceful, the corruption from his face GONE, his blue eyes serene, Ahriman beside him diminished and silent
scenes.camera: wide shot, slow gentle push-in to the sealed prince

scenes.description: HARD CUT — return to the frame story. Medium shot of the CHILD at the foot of the tree, exactly as in the opening. The blade of grass still in their hand. They look up at the tree's distant glowing canopy with peaceful awe
scenes.camera: medium shot of the child, eye level

scenes.description: Close-up on the child's face, smiling now, understanding. The child holds the blade of grass up toward the tree, a small offering. After they speak softly with wisdom beyond their years, the camera lifts up slowly to reveal dozens of other children playing in lush gardens at the tree's base, distant crystal starships rising into a galaxy-filled sky
scenes.camera: close-up, then dramatic camera lift revealing the world

dialogue.line: And the prince still holds him. So that we may live.

scenes.description: Final wide cinematic tableau. The crystal tree at the center of a vast flourishing garden world, children playing, fruit dropping, golden light. Beyond, starships rising, alien worlds blooming with the tree's healing light, the cosmos itself glowing more vividly, every distant nebula touched by life. End on a slow gentle pull-back into the cosmic infinity
scenes.camera: very wide cinematic tableau, slow pull-back to cosmic scale
